content:
## Page Section / Title
Key Visuals.

## All Verbatim Text
- Key Visuals.
- MEET OUR SPEAKER
- Vivek Jayaram
- COMPANY JAYARAM LAW
- Vivek is the founder of Jayaram Law, advising creators and innovators on IP transactions, corporate deals, and general counsel needs. He teaches intellectual property and entertainment law at the University of Miami.
- Phoenix
- WEDAGO21
- USA 5:30 PM TO 9:30 PM
- ai
- sa
- lon
- EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS
- Office Studio of Jayaram Law, Design District, Miami.

## Visual Elements
- **Logos**: 
  - A small, stylized 3D icon of a meerkat (or similar animal) with a colorful, gradient texture (blues, purples, pinks) in the top-right corner of the white card.
  - A stacked text logo "ai sa lon" with "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" in smaller, uppercase font below it, located in the bottom-right corner of the white card.
- **Color Palette**: 
  - A gradient shape (pink to blue) on the left side of the photo frame.
  - The white card has a light gray background; the main page background is a pale gray.
- **Typography**: 
  - "Key Visuals.": Bold, sans-serif (likely a modern sans-serif like Helvetica or similar), large size.
  - "MEET OUR SPEAKER": Uppercase, sans-serif, smaller size.
  - "Vivek Jayaram": Bold, sans-serif, large size (name).
  - "COMPANY JAYARAM LAW": Uppercase, sans-serif, smaller size (company label).
  - Body copy: Regular, sans-serif, medium size (descriptive text).
  - "Phoenix": Bold, sans-serif, large size (event location).
  - "WEDAGO21": Bold, sans-serif, medium size (event date).
  - "USA 5:30 PM TO 9:30 PM": Uppercase, sans-serif, medium size (event time).
  - "ai sa lon": Stacked, sans-serif, varying sizes (logo text).
  - "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS": Uppercase, sans-serif, small size (tagline).
  - "Office Studio of Jayaram Law, Design District, Miami.": Regular, sans-serif, small size (location text).
- **Imagery / Photography**: 
  - A professional headshot of a man (Vivek Jayaram) in a white shirt, centered within a geometric, irregular polygon (gray background) with a gradient accent (pink to blue) on the left. The photo style is clean, modern, and professional, with even lighting and a neutral background.
- **Iconography**: 
  - A small location pin icon (black) next to the office address.
- **Layout Grid**: 
  - The white card is centered on the page with balanced margins (top, bottom, left, right).
  - The card uses a two-column structure: left column for text (speaker info, event details) and right column for the photo and logos.
  - Text is left-aligned within the left column; the photo is right-aligned within the card, overlapping slightly with the text column.
- **Geometric / Decorative Elements**: 
  - An irregular, asymmetrical polygon (gray) framing the headshot, with a gradient triangular accent (pink to blue) on the left side of the polygon.

## Page Layout Summary
The page has a light gray background with a centered white card (the "Key Visuals" example). The card is divided into two main sections: a left text column (containing speaker info, company, bio, event details) and a right visual column (containing the headshot, gradient shape, and logos). The text is left-aligned, and the photo is right-aligned, creating a balanced, modern layout. The overall arrangement is clean and structured, with clear separation between text and imagery.

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- No explicit do/don't rules are printed on the page, but the layout demonstrates:
  - Use of a geometric frame for photos (irregular polygon with gradient accent).
  - Stacked logo text ("ai sa lon") with a tagline below.
  - Consistent typography hierarchy (bold for names/locations, regular for body copy).
  - Balanced spacing between text and imagery.
